title: CodeBuilderSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents Code Builder settings. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableCodeBuilder.description: Indicates whether Code Builder is enabled (true) or not (false). When enabled, you can install and use the generally available (GA) Code Builder package in the org.
